dependencies.description:
This is a Python implementation of John Gruber's Markdown. It is almost
completely compliant with the reference implementation, though there are
a few very minor differences. See John's Syntax Documentation for the
syntax rules.
dependencies.name: py-markdown

dependencies.description:
Build and publish crates with pyo3, rust-cpython and cffi bindings as
well as rust binaries as python packages.
dependencies.name: py-maturin

dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description: Pygments is a syntax highlighting package written in Python.
dependencies.name: py-pygments

dependencies.description: PyYAML is a YAML parser and emitter for Python.

dependencies.description:
Tomli is a Python library for parsing TOML. Tomli is fully compatible
with TOML v1.0.0.
dependencies.name: py-tomli

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

description:
Zensical is a modern static site generator designed to simplify building
and maintaining project documentation. It's built by the creators of
Material for MkDocs and shares the same core design principles and
philosophy – batteries included, easy to use, with powerful
customization options.
name: py-zensical

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
